summary: Dependency update task to bump libjpeg-turbo from 3.1.0 to 3.1.4.1 in the mono/skia DEPS file and cgmanifest.json, as part of the v4 native dependency refresh tracked in #3679.

reproEvidence.environmentDetails: mono/skia DEPS, cgmanifest.json — libjpeg-turbo 3.1.0 currently referenced

repoLinks.description: Parent tracker: Update native dependencies for v4
PR #3720 (zlib bump) incorrectly closed this issue via stray Fixes reference

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: cgmanifest.json still records libjpeg-turbo 3.1.0 and no PR has merged the update; issue was reopened after accidental closure.

analysis.summary: libjpeg-turbo 3.1.0 is currently recorded in cgmanifest.json for SkiaSharp v4. The target is 3.1.4.1 from Chromium's libjpeg-turbo fork. The issue is open and outstanding — a prior zlib PR accidentally closed it via a stray 'Fixes #3689' commit message, and the maintainer reopened it. The update requires locating the 3.1.4.1 commit in chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/deps/libjpeg_turbo.git, updating the DEPS entry in mono/skia, and updating cgmanifest.json.

codeInvestigation.finding: libjpeg-turbo is listed at version 3.1.0 with downloadUrl https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo. Target is 3.1.4.1.

Skia submodule is not checked out in this environment; DEPS cannot be read directly. The comment in issue #3689 confirms the Skia m147 bump already brought libjpeg-turbo from 2.1.5.1 → 3.1.0; remaining gap is 3.1.0 → 3.1.4.1.

keySignals.interpretation: Well-scoped dependency bump with a clear source and target version.

keySignals.text: Reopening — this was incorrectly closed by PR #3720 (zlib bump) which had `Fixes #3689` in its commit message when it should have been `Fixes #3914`. The libjpeg-turbo update is still outstanding.
keySignals.interpretation: Confirms the update is still needed and was not completed; administrative false-close, not a real fix.

analysis.rationale: This is a well-scoped native dependency version bump with a clear upstream source, a parent tracker (#3679), and existing milestone assignment (4.x RC 1). The enhancement classification fits because it improves an existing native dependency rather than reporting a defect or requesting new API. The native-dependency-update skill is the recommended tool for execution.

resolution.hypothesis: Update the libjpeg-turbo commit hash in mono/skia DEPS to the 3.1.4.1 tag from chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/deps/libjpeg_turbo.git and update cgmanifest.json to version 3.1.4.1.

proposals.title: Update DEPS and cgmanifest.json via native-dependency-update skill
proposals.description: Use the native-dependency-update skill to locate the 3.1.4.1 commit in the Chromium libjpeg-turbo fork, update DEPS in mono/skia, rebuild natives, and update cgmanifest.json.

resolution.recommendedReason: The issue body already provides the exact source repository and version. The native-dependency-update skill is purpose-built for this workflow and the effort is xs.

actionability.reason: The update target, source repository, and task checklist are all specified. The issue is assigned to a milestone (4.x RC 1) and the native-dependency-update skill can execute this directly.
